title: lofivibes
description: This mod allows you to listen to lofi girl broadcasts directly in Minecraft
body:
📗This mod is created for those who want to listen to live broadcasts of Lofi girl in Minecraft📗

🟡To open the mod menu press F10🟡

📚The mod menu can be opened in the game and in the main menu of Minecraft📚

📕This project is still under development.📕

For stable audio streaming, you need to have a good internet connection
